message:
fix: doctor fix functions detect SQLite by file type, not backend config (bd-plvka)

After Phase 2 changed the default backend to dolt, OrphanedDependencies and
ChildParentDependencies always skipped because they checked the configured
backend (now dolt) instead of what actually exists on disk. Replace the
configfile-based check with an os.Stat check: if beads.db is a regular file
it is SQLite -- operate on it; if missing or a directory, skip.

Also skip TestMultiRepoDeletionTracking which exercises the removed JSONL
multi-repo sync path (ExportToMultiRepo is a no-op on Dolt).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
